title: juncus dregeanus subsp. dregeanus
intro: Juncus dregeanus subsp. dregeanus, also known as Drege's rush or Drege's rush-grass, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Juncus dregeanus subsp. dregeanus include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
